source_reference: SLB Monthly Report - May 2026 Editable v2 PDF. Aggregate source values extracted from rendered pages; unmatched rows are documented without invented values. Gmail and Google Drive searches on 2026-06-26, the narrowed 2026-06-27 connected-source pass, and 2026-06-28 Gmail/Drive rechecks found no approved paid Meta Ads, aggregate Page/Post, DashThis/source, or Content Ops May 2026 source export. Partial Meta receipt facts are preserved as unmatched source values only because they are not approved May 1-31 paid performance exports.

source_documents.label: SLB Monthly Report - May 2026 Editable v2 PDF
source_documents.path: tmp/pdfs/SLB Monthly Report - May 2026 Editable v2 (1).pdf

queries: ("SLB" OR "Students Loan Bureau" OR "Students' Loan Bureau") ("Amount spent" OR "Reach" OR "Clicks" OR "Meta Ads" OR "Facebook Ads") "May 2026" has:attachment -in:spam -in:trash
("SLB" OR "Students Loan Bureau" OR "Students' Loan Bureau") (csv OR xlsx OR export OR dashboard OR DashThis OR "May 2026") after:2026/05/01 before:2026/07/01 -in:spam -in:trash
source_search_provenance.result: Found the already-reviewed May 2026 SLB PDF, Meta billing receipts/disabled-account notices for the selected ad account, and operational/creative/client threads. No approved daily paid Meta Ads export, DashThis value export, or Content Ops total export was found.

queries: SLB May 2026
DashThis SLB
SLB paid May
SLB Monthly Report
source_search_provenance.result: Found operations, proposal, budget/rate-sheet, and creative treatment files. No approved May 2026 source export for selected-account paid spend/reach/clicks or Content Ops totals was found.

queries: published OR posts OR content OR created OR total
amount spent OR spend OR paid OR Meta Ads
reach OR clicks OR comments OR shares OR reactions OR follows
source_search_provenance.result: The full 14-page SLB May 2026 PDF scan confirmed Facebook follows/reach/views/interactions and top-post example values, but found no approved selected-account paid spend/reach/clicks export and no aggregate Content Ops published-post or content-items-created totals. Page 6 contains a numbered content-support category list, not a safe count of published posts or created content items.

queries: workspace tmp and /tmp files matching SLB, Students Loan, DashThis, May 2026, Meta export, Facebook export
Downloads, Desktop, and Documents files matching SLB, Students Loan, DashThis, May 2026, Meta export, Facebook export
CSV/XLSX/PDF candidates matching SLB or reporting terms; spot-check Copy of SLB Calculation.xlsx shared strings
source_search_provenance.result: Found SLB tender, proposal, pricing, creative, brand, and the already-reviewed May 2026 monthly PDF artifacts. The ambiguous Copy of SLB Calculation.xlsx is a proposal/pricing workbook that mentions campaign reports as deliverables, not actual May 2026 performance values. No approved daily paid Meta Ads export, DashThis value export, Meta/Facebook May export, or aggregate Content Ops totals file was found in the searched local locations.

queries: Gmail: SLB/Students Loan Bureau Meta Ads/paid/spend/reach/clicks May 2026 with attachments
Gmail: SLB/Students Loan Bureau Content Ops/published posts/content items/post reactions/Facebook export with attachments
Gmail: SLB Monthly Report / SLB May Report / SLB Report May 2026
Google Drive: SLB paid, Students Loan Bureau May 2026, 791712443035541, SLB Content Ops, SLB Facebook export, SLB DashThis, SLB Monthly May 2026, SLB Report
source_search_provenance.result: Found the exact May 2026 SLB report email with the already-reviewed PDF attachment, Meta billing receipts for selected-account partial billing windows May 21-24 and May 26-31, a selected-account disabled notice, daily task/status notes, proposals, operational documents, and creative assets. The Meta receipts show partial billed spend/impression subtotals but are not approved May 1-31 paid performance exports and do not provide paid reach or clicks. No approved full-month paid Meta Ads export, DashThis/source export, aggregate Page/Post export, or aggregate Content Ops total export was found.

queries: ("SLB" OR "Students Loan Bureau" OR "Students' Loan Bureau") ("Amount spent" OR "Reach" OR "Clicks" OR "Meta Ads" OR "Facebook Ads" OR export OR csv OR xlsx) after:2026/05/01 before:2026/07/15 has:attachment -in:spam -in:trash

("SLB" OR "Students Loan Bureau" OR "Students' Loan Bureau") ("post reactions" OR "post comments" OR "post shares" OR "published posts" OR "content items" OR "Content Ops" OR "Facebook export") after:2026/05/01 before:2026/07/15 -in:spam -in:trash

("SLB" OR "Students Loan Bureau" OR "Students' Loan Bureau") (DashThis OR "source values" OR "monthly report" OR "May report" OR "May 2026 report") after:2026/05/01 before:2026/07/15 -in:spam -in:trash
source_search_provenance.result: The selected-account search still found only Meta receipts and the selected-account disabled notice, including the partial May 21-24 and May 26-31 receipt windows already preserved as unmatched source facts. The paid/source attachment search was noisy with creative, quotation, treatment, podcast, and March-April report threads, but no approved May 1-31 paid performance export was visible from the returned subjects/snippets/attachment names. The organic/content aggregate query returned no messages. The DashThis/source report query found the already-reviewed May 2026 SLB report PDF email, task notes, and drafts/previews, but no DashThis/source export or additional aggregate paid, Page/Post, or Content Ops values.

Gmail: 791712443035541/act_791712443035541/SLB paid Amount spent/Reach/Clicks/Meta Ads/Facebook Ads/Ads Manager/export/csv/xlsx after 2026-05-01 before 2026-07-31 with attachments
source_search_provenance.result: Drive searches returned creative treatment/storyboard/proposal/rate-sheet/quote files, task logs, operational trackers/maps, an operations report, and budget collections; the account-id query returned no files. The Gmail organic/content/export query returned no messages, and the paid/account attachment query returned banner, creative-treatment, podcast quotation/treatment, unrelated bid, and March-April report threads. No approved May 1-31 selected-account paid export, aggregate Page/Post export, DashThis/source export, or aggregate Content Ops total export was found, so the unresolved parity rows remain null.
